STL-SW.name: STL Switch (currently LTL)
STL-SW.description: Owner currently renting long-term, considering switching to STL
key_metrics_to_show: STL net vs LTL net (apples-to-apples including bills)
STL-SW.conversion_rate_signal: High when: tenants leaving soon + unfurnished is being furnished + no mortgage

EX-STL.name: EX-STL (currently with another agent)
EX-STL.description: Already doing STL but with an underperforming agent; wants to switch to Stayful
EX-STL.key_question: 'How many reviews did you get in the last 3 months?' — opens the performance gap immediately

PURCH.name: Purchase (buying property for STL)
PURCH.description: Purchasing property with STL as the intended use from day 1
PURCH.risk: Developer-affiliated management is the primary competitor. Must engage at exchange or earlier.
developer_counter_tactics: Call out cleaning cost omission in developer projections
Emphasise: developer net figures omit £300-600/mo in cleaning
Sign before developer’s affiliate approaches at exchange
PURCH.key_insight: Same-building entries (018+034 Bosworth House LE1) = ask every purchase lead if there are other buyers in the building

SELL.name: Sell-STL Bridge
SELL.description: Selling property, using STL as income bridge during sale period
primary_triggers: Property on market but not selling
SELL.key_frame: STL covers the mortgage while you wait for the right buyer. You’re not locked in — we work around viewings.
SELL.objection_handling: Viewings concern: 48-hour notice for viewings, calendar blocking for viewing days possible

ABROAD.name: Moving Abroad
ABROAD.description: Owner relocating internationally, needs UK property fully managed without owner involvement
ABROAD.urgency_trigger: Relocation date = natural hard deadline. Offer tied to departure date is highly effective.

R2R.name: Rent-to-Rent
R2R.description: R2R operator taking property on company let to sublet as STL
R2R.viability_threshold: R2R deals need >£2,000/yr margin after rent+bills before management fee to be viable
R2R.common_failure_mode: R2R rent too high — after management fee + R2R rent, operator margin is near zero
R2R.pre_qualify_check: Ask: what is the R2R rent + bills? What net are you projecting? If margin <£3k/yr, redirect or decline.
